title: List of pacifist organisations
content: A Pacifist organization promotes the pacifist principle of renouncing war and violence for political ends. They are distinguished from organizations concerned only with removing nuclear weapon s from war, though those organization may call for suspension of hostilities as well. Other organizations include those that deal with other concerns, but have a strong pacifist element. Pacifist organizations: "Nuclear pacifist" organizations: Organizations that cite pacifism as an aim:
